# The 2023 "block the AI scrapers" robots.txt, still pasted into sites today.
# The author meant "do not train on my content".
# What they actually did was delete themselves from ChatGPT and Perplexity,
# while Bytespider, which ignores this file, carries on regardless.

User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: OAI-SearchBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: PerplexityBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: ClaudeBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /

User-agent: *
Allow: /

Sitemap: https://example.com/sitemap.xml
